title: chalash #2522
definition:
1) to be weak, be prostrate
    1a) (Qal) to be prostrate
 2) to weaken, disable, prostrate
    2a) (Qal) to disable, prostrate
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be weak, be prostrate
    1a) (Qal) to be prostrate
 2) to weaken, disable, prostrate
    2a) (Qal) to disable, prostrate

    NASB:  to be weak or prostrate
